title: Netanyahu Reveals He Had Prostate Cancer and Underwent Radiation Therapy
summary_full: The Israeli leader had surgery in 2024 for an enlarged prostate. More recently, follow-up care detected a tumor, his office disclosed on Friday.
summary_public: The Israeli leader had surgery in 2024 for an enlarged prostate. More recently, follow-up care detected a tumor, his office disclosed on Friday.
